nasb.text: As for me, I heard but could not understand; so I said, “My lord, what will be the outcome of these events?”

esv.text: I heard, but I did not understand. Then I said, “O my lord, what shall be the outcome of these things?”

cnv.text: 我聽見，卻不明白，我就問：“我主啊，這些事的結局是怎樣呢？”

ccb.text: 我听见这话，却不明白，就问他：“我主啊，这些事的结局会怎样呢？”
